text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
76 
SPIINJ_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Spinal Cord Injury End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for spinal cord injury as of the 
end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: SPIINJ_MEDICARE 
LONG NAME: SPIINJ_MEDICARE 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived)
